About Me

Building pipelines,
closing continents.

Over 5+ years, I've helped US and Australian companies build their APAC pipeline from zero — booking qualified meetings with enterprise decision-makers at companies like Crown Resorts Australia, AFL, Sun Life, EastWest Bank, and FWD Singapore across 10+ countries.

I specialize in multi-channel outreach — cold email, LinkedIn prospecting, and cold calling — backed by deep research and AI-powered personalization at scale using Claude, Instantly.ai, and Clay.com.

Seeking full-time remote Inside Sales, SDR, or BDR roles with US, Australian, or global companies. Available immediately.
